# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

Resources:
  FunctionAppWithIdentity:
    Type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    Properties:
      Kind: functionapp
      Identity:
        type: SystemAssigned
    DependsOn:
      - [Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts, 'storageAccountName']
      - [Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults, 'keyVaultName']
      - [Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases, 'sqlDatabaseName']
      - [Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts, 'cosmosDbAccountName']

  StorageAccountAccessRole:
    Type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    Properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', variables('storageBlobDataOwner'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', 'FunctionAppWithIdentity'), '2019-08-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"

  KeyVaultAccessRole:
    Type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    Properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', variables('keyVaultContributor'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', 'FunctionAppWithIdentity'), '2019-08-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"

  SqlAccessRole:
    Type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    Properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', variables('sqlDBContributor'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', 'FunctionAppWithIdentity'), '2019-08-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"

  CosmosDbAccessRole:
    Type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    Properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', variables('cosmosDBContributor'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', 'FunctionAppWithIdentity'), '2019-08-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"

Variables:
  storageBlobDataOwner: b7e6dc6d-f1b3-47e8-b6a9-445fe8d042b2
  keyVaultContributor: b8f9e7b2-e7c3-42e1-a8fc-1ab22ee30b7a
  sqlDBContributor: 0a8e96ff-8bf7-4451-9a2f-0b7c3e1c3c9d
  cosmosDBContributor: a231e904-e8cf-4328-a6ad-ebd1a05a76e4

Parameters:
  storageAccountName:
    Type: string
  keyVaultName:
    Type: string
  sqlServerName:
    Type: string
  sqlDatabaseName:
    Type: string
  cosmosDbAccountName:
    Type: string
